personas.name: Appreciative User
personas.description: A user who generally appreciates the app for its ability to help them monitor and understand their emotions.
goals: To effectively monitor and understand their emotional state
To be honest with themselves in a private and safe environment
To utilize the app as a tool for self-awareness and potentially for discussions with doctors
pain_points: Inability to change the app's language
context: Valuing privacy and safety in expressing emotions
Using the app to prepare for or discuss with doctors

personas.name: Mindful Tracker
personas.description: A mental health enthusiast seeking to monitor and understand their emotional state.
goals: Track and manage my mood patterns
Gain clarity on my emotional state
Reflect on my mental health progress over time
pain_points: Difficulty recognizing and understanding my emotions
Struggling to maintain a consistent mental health tracking routine
context: Daily life and mental health management
constraints: Needs a user-friendly and gentle tracking experience
Requires regular reminders and encouragement to maintain tracking habit

personas.name: Emotional Tracker
personas.description: A user who tracks their emotions and seeks help through mobile apps.
goals: Understand triggers for anxiety or sadness
constraints: Needs an app that provides accurate insights

personas.name: Emotionally Aware Tracker
personas.description: A user seeking emotional support and understanding through mood tracking.
goals: Understand and track my emotions effectively
Identify patterns in my behavior and mood
Find emotional support and relief through self-reflection
pain_points: Struggling with depressive episodes or mood swings
Need for a tool to help process and release emotions
context: Daily life, managing stress and emotions
During depressive episodes or difficult times
When seeking self-awareness and personal growth

personas.name: Frustrated Mental Health Tracker
personas.description: A mental health app user frustrated with limitations and subscription issues.
goals: Effectively track and manage mental health
Utilize the app as a tool for professional care discussions
pain_points: Limited access to results behind a paywall
Difficulties with subscription and refund processes
context: Long-term users of mental health apps
Individuals seeking to understand and manage their mental health
Users who value the app as a tool for professional care discussions
constraints: Limited budget or willingness to pay for premium features
Frustration with app limitations and subscription issues
Need for reliable and valid information

personas.name: Interested Tracker
personas.description: A curious user interested in tracking their mood and thoughts, seeking a helpful tool for self-reflection and therapy discussions.
goals: Reflect on current situation and personality
pain_points: Limited emotional options for daily tracking
context: Seeking self-reflection and therapy discussion tools
constraints: Needs to be easy to use and structured
